subject: A vast pale alien face looms behind a bedroom dressing table, its enormous black eyes containing tiny skull reflections; flanking it are two ghostly draped forms hovering beside ornate mirrors, and two small green-shaded lamps sit on the table below
description: A towering, pale grey alien-like entity dominates the composition, its featureless face and massive black eyes taking up the upper half of the painting. Within those eyes small skull shapes are visible. The figure's lower half dissolves into a cold blue-white mist that pools over an ornate dressing table in the foreground. Two teal-shaded desk lamps sit on the table's surface. On either side, gilt-framed mirrors float mid-air, each flanked by a shrouded, cape-like white form. The palette is cold teal and grey throughout, with a faint warm amber accent on the lamp shades. The scene reads as a bedroom invaded by something enormous and otherworldly — a figure of alien calm in a domestic space it has completely overwhelmed.
foreground: ornate dressing table with two green-shaded lamps
background: cold blue-grey void with floating draped forms and gilt mirrors
